title: MACTouchMC
description: Utilise MacbBook's touch bar for Minecraft
body:
# MACtouchMC 🖥️
![Java](https://img.shields.io/badge/Java-21-orange)
![Fabric](https://img.shields.io/badge/Loader-Fabric-beige)
![License](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-MIT-blue)
![Platform](https://img.shields.io/badge/Platform-macOS%20(Intel%2FApple%20Silicon)-lightgrey)

**The ultimate Touch Bar integration for modern Minecraft.**
Recover the functionality of your F-keys, control your media, and "Free the F Key" with custom input extensions.

## 🚀 Key Features
* **Context Aware:** Automatically switches layouts (Menu, Game, Debug).
* **Input Extension:** Remap physical keys to the Touch Bar to declutter your keyboard.
* **Debug Suite:** One-tap access to Chunk Borders, Hitboxes, and Reload commands. 

---
![Custom Buttons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e83e72e4ef42d25ab66a624c224d6eb9d1ca2a9e_0.webp)
---

## 🔮 Future Plans
We are just getting started! Here is what's coming next:

### 1️⃣ Render Distance Slider
> **Replaces the "Cycle" button**  
> Much faster and more precise control over your view distance. 

### 2️⃣ Visual Immersion & Feedback
> **[NEW] Advancement "Toast" Notification** 🏆  
> *Concept*: When you get an advancement, the entire Touch Bar **flashes gold** and scrolls the advancement title (e.g., "Stone Age") across the bar for 3 seconds.  
> *Why*: A huge dopamine hit that keeps chat clean!

> **[NEW] "Now Playing" Ticker** 🎵  
> *Concept*: When a new music track starts (e.g., "C418 - Sweden"), it **slides in** from the right, displays the track name, and fades out.  
> *Why*: Aesthetics matter. Adds a premium, native Spotify-like feel.

### 3️⃣ Main Menu Quick Actions
> Fast access to your favorite servers and singleplayer worlds directly from the main menu.

### 4️⃣ And much more to come! 🚀

---

## 📦 Installation
1. Install **[Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/)** for Minecraft 1.21+.
2. Download the latest `mactouchmc-x.x.x.jar`.
3. Drop it into your `.minecraft/mods` folder.
4. **Launch & Enjoy!**

---
